input.description: 15-second monologue with one clear action item

output.polishedSample: Speaker 1: Okay, this is a quick reminder to myself. I need to call Sarah Johnson tomorrow morning and send her the IUL illustration we discussed. Her son just started college so she's thinking about supplemental life insurance.
output.summaryTLDR: Speaker 1 reminded them of a task involving contacting Sarah Johnson and sending her an illustration related to life insurance.
output.transcriptSample:
[00:00] Speaker 1: Okay, this is a quick reminder to myself.
[00:02] Speaker 1: I need to call Sarah Johnson tomorrow morning
[00:05] Speaker 1: and send her the IUL illustration we discussed.
[00:08] Speaker 1: Her son just started college
[00:09] Speaker 1: so she's thinking about supplemental life insurance.
